nodes.recentposition: Strategy & Execution Consulting Intern at Cornerstone Advisors in Scottsdale, AZ
nodes.bios: Hey there! My name is Edward Li and I initiated in my Fall quarter of my first year here at UCI. In my free time I enjoy backpacking/hiking national parks and looking at fun business case studies. A fun fact about myself is that I've seen four musicals in four different cities since attending college. Ask me about DSP & MUSA, consulting, diaspora & food in the United States, Naruto, Hunter x Hunter, and Marvel vs DC.
